nodes.context: Criminal organization from Bahia, Brazil, specializing in drug trafficking, robberies, kidnappings, and murders.
Defunct criminal faction that was the predecessor of Bonde do Maluco.
Brazilian criminal organization allied with Bonde do Maluco.
Brazilian criminal organization rival of Bonde do Maluco.
Criminal organization rival of Bonde do Maluco in Bahia.
Ally of Bonde do Maluco in the interior of Bahia.
Criminal organization listed as an ally of Bonde do Maluco in the infobox.
Criminal organization listed as an ally of Bonde do Maluco in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The group was born as an offshoot of a defunct criminal faction known as Caveira
edges.context: Bonde do Maluco originated as an offshoot of the defunct Caveira faction.

edges.evidence_quote: The criminal group is allied with the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).
edges.context: Bonde do Maluco is allied with the PCC.

edges.evidence_quote: Its rivals include the Comando Vermelho (CV)
edges.context: Bonde do Maluco considers Comando Vermelho a rival.

edges.evidence_quote: Its rivals include the Comando Vermelho (CV) and Katiara
edges.context: Bonde do Maluco considers Katiara a rival.

edges.evidence_quote: in the interior of the state, it is said to have allies of the Rio de Janeiro gang, such as the Primeiro Comando de Eunápolis.
edges.context: Bonde do Maluco is allied with Primeiro Comando de Eunápolis in the interior of Bahia.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Primeiro Comando da Capital , Terceiro Comando Puro , Guardiões do Estado
edges.context: Bonde do Maluco is allied with Terceiro Comando Puro according to the infobox.
